name: Chongyun
description:
Chongyun (Chinese: 重云 Chóngyún) is a playable Cryo character in Genshin Impact.

Born with an excess of yang (positive) energy, Chongyun has become a highly effective exorcist in Liyue — so effective to the point where she hasn't seen a spirit herself, as they immediately flee when she approaches. The excessive yang energy also makes her particularly susceptible to heat and strong emotion, which has led to some rather unexpected results.
creator: Izumamidoriya
